title: GPT-5.5 Instant: smarter, clearer, and more personalized
summary: GPT-5.5 Instant updates ChatGPT’s default model with smarter, more accurate answers, reduced hallucinations, and improved personalization controls.

title: New ways to buy ChatGPT ads
summary: OpenAI expands ChatGPT ads with a beta self-serve Ads Manager, CPC bidding, and enhanced measurement tools—built to protect privacy and keep conversations separate from ads.

title: Google is partnering with XPRIZE and Range Media Partners on the $3.5 million Future Vision film competition.
summary: Google is partnering with XPRIZE and Range Media Partners on the $3.5 million Future Vision film competition.

title: How Hapag-Lloyd uses Amazon Bedrock to transform customer feedback into actionable insights
summary: Hapag-Lloyd's Digital Customer Experience and Engineering team, distributed between Hamburg and Gdańsk, drives digital innovation by developing and maintaining customer-facing web and mobile products. In this post, we walk you through our generative AI–powered feedback analysis solution built using Amazon Bedrock, Elasticsearch, and open-source frameworks like LangChain and LangGraph

title: Streamlining generative AI development with MLflow v3.10 on Amazon SageMaker AI
summary: Today, we’re excited to announce that Amazon SageMaker AI MLflow Apps now support MLflow version 3.10, bringing enhanced capabilities for generative AI development and streamlined experiment tracking to your generative AI workflows. Building on the foundations established with Amazon SageMaker AI MLflow Apps, this latest version introduces powerful new features for observability, evaluation, and generative […]

title: Introducing OS Level Actions in Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Browser
summary: We’re announcing OS Level Actions for AgentCore Browser. This new capability unblocks these scenarios by exposing direct OS control through the InvokeBrowser API, so agents can interact with content visible on the screen, not only what's accessible through the browser's web layer. By combining full-desktop screenshots with mouse and keyboard control at the OS level, agents can observe native UI, reason about it, and act on it within the same session. This post walks through how OS Level Actions work, what actions are supported, and how to get started.

title: Secure AI agents with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Identity on Amazon ECS
summary: AI agents in production require secure access to external services. Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Identity, available as a standalone service, secures how your AI agents access external services whether they run on compute platforms like Amazon ECS, Amazon EKS, AWS Lambda, or on-premises. This post implements Authorization Code Grant (3-legged OAuth) on Amazon ECS with secure session binding and scoped tokens.

title: Intelligence-driven message defense and insights using Amazon Bedrock
summary: In this post, you will learn how you can use Amazon Nova Foundation Models in Amazon Bedrock to apply generative AI techniques for both business protection and enhancement. You can identify obvious and disguised attempts at direct contact while gaining valuable insights into customer sentiment and service improvement opportunities.

title: Introducing Brand Studio: The creative production platform powered by your brand
summary: We’re excited to introduce Brand Studio by Stability AI, the end-to-end creative production platform powered by your brand.

title: Stability AI Joins the Tech Coalition
summary: We’re pleased to share that Stability AI has joined the Tech Coalition, a global alliance of leading technology companies working together to combat online child sexual exploitation and abuse.

title: Warner Music Group and Stability AI Join Forces To Build The Next Generation Of Responsible AI Tools For Music Creation
summary: Warner Music Group and Stability AI today announced a collaborative effort to advance the use of responsible AI in music creation, combining WMG’s long-standing advocacy for principled innovation with Stability AI’s expertise and leadership in commercially-safe generative audio.

title: Universal Music Group and Stability AI Announce Strategic Alliance to Co-Develop Professional AI Music Creation Tools
summary: Universal Music Group and Stability AI today announced a strategic alliance to develop next-generation professional music creation tools, powered by responsibly trained generative AI and built to support the creative process of artists, producers and songwriters globally.

title: Stability AI and EA Partner to Empower Artists, Designers, and Developers to Reimagine Game Development
summary: Stability AI and Electronic Arts (EA) have formed a strategic partnership to co-develop transformative generative AI models, tools, and workflows that empower EA’s artists, designers, and developers to reimagine how games are made.

title: Stability AI Brings Image Services to Amazon Bedrock, Delivering End-to-End Creative Control with Enterprise-Grade Infrastructure
summary: Today, we're excited to announce we’re expanding our partnership with Amazon Web Services to bring our Stable Image Services to Amazon Bedrock.

title: Stability AI’s Annual Integrity Transparency Report
summary: At Stability AI, we are committed to building and deploying generative AI responsibly, and we believe that transparency is foundational to safe and ethical AI.

title: Stability AI Introduces Stable Audio 2.5, the First Audio Model Built for Enterprise Sound Production at Scale
summary: We’re excited to release Stable Audio 2.5, our latest audio model and the first developed for enterprise-grade use cases. Stable Audio 2.5 introduces advancements in quality and control that address the demand for dynamic compositions that can be adapted for custom brand needs.

title: The Enterprise AI Maturity Model | Cohere
summary: Learn the five phases of the enterprise AI maturity journey, where most companies get stuck, and how to overcome barriers to get to production.

title: Cohere Aleph Alpha Join Forces
summary: Cohere and Aleph Alpha join forces to form global AI powerhouse as nations and enterprises demand control over their technology

title: Context Caching is Available 2024/08/02
summary: The DeepSeek API now supports V4-Pro and V4-Flash, available via both the OpenAI ChatCompletions interface and the Anthropic interface. To access the new models, the base_url remains unchanged, and the model parameter should be set to deepseek-v4-pro or deepseek-v4-flash .

title: New API Features 2024/07/25
summary: The DeepSeek API now supports V4-Pro and V4-Flash, available via both the OpenAI ChatCompletions interface and the Anthropic interface. To access the new models, the base_url remains unchanged, and the model parameter should be set to deepseek-v4-pro or deepseek-v4-flash .

title: GLM-5-Turbo launched
summary: Zhipu AI introduced GLM-5-Turbo, a base model optimized for agent scenarios with stronger tool use and long-horizon execution. The page says it is deeply optimized at the training level for agent core capabilities.

title: GLM-5 announced as flagship foundation model for agent engineering
summary: Zhipu AI presented GLM-5 as its new flagship foundation model for agent engineering, highlighting open-source SOTA performance in coding and agent capabilities. The page also notes strong benchmark results including SWE-bench Verified and Terminal Bench 2.0.

title: GLM-4.6V open-source vision reasoning model released
summary: Zhipu AI released GLM-4.6V, described as a high-performing open-source visual reasoning model at the 100B-class level. It supports native tool calling and 128K long context for automated task completion.

title: AutoGLM agent model introduced
summary: Zhipu AI announced AutoGLM, an agent model with autonomous planning, reasoning, and execution capabilities. It is positioned as solving key challenges in task planning, data scarcity, and policy optimization while enabling continuous self-improvement.

title: AutoClaw launched
summary: Zhipu AI featured AutoClaw as a product that can be installed on any computer in about one minute. It is presented as a named product in the company's AI product lineup.

title: GLM-OS concept unveiled with AutoGLM and GLM-PC
summary: On November 29, Zhipu AI formally proposed the GLM-OS concept and released two agent products: AutoGLM and GLM-PC. This marked a broader push into the agent ecosystem.

title: CogAgent-9B open-sourced as GLM-PC base model
summary: To support the large-model agent ecosystem, Zhipu AI open-sourced CogAgent-9B, the base model behind GLM-PC. The model, CogAgent-9B-20241220, is trained from GLM-4V-9B and is designed for agent tasks using only screenshots as input.

title: Agent OpenDay updates: AutoGLM and GLM-PC progress
summary: At Zhipu AI's Agent OpenDay, the company shared new agent progress including AutoGLM performing more than 50-step operations and executing tasks across apps. It also announced a more automated web-browsing experience and that GLM-PC had entered internal testing.

title: Seed3D 2.0 Released
summary: ByteDance Seed announced Seed3D 2.0, highlighting higher precision and greater usability as key improvements in the new release.

title: Introducing Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM
summary: ByteDance Seed introduced Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM, designed for attentive listening, robust interference suppression, and more natural voice interaction.

title: ByteDance Seed 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment is Now Open
summary: ByteDance Seed announced the opening of its 2027 Foundation Model campus recruitment program, including internship opportunities.

title: Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview Model Release on Arena
summary: ByteDance Seed released the Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview model on Arena as a preview of its upcoming capabilities.

title: Seed 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seed 2.0, marking a major new model release from the company.

title: Introducing Seedream 5.0 Lite
summary: ByteDance Seed announced Seedream 5.0 Lite, emphasizing deeper thinking and more accurate generation in a lighter model variant.

title: Seedance 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seedance 2.0 as a new model release.

title: Seed Prover 1.5
summary: ByteDance Seed introduced Seed Prover 1.5, an advanced mathematical reasoning model built on a novel agentic architecture.

title: WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5 announced
summary: 01.AI announced WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5, positioning 2026 as a critical year for enterprise deployment of multi-agent systems. The update is presented as a major milestone for enterprise AI adoption.

title: 01.AI launches “Super Employee” enterprise AI agent
summary: 01.AI launched “Super Employee,” an enterprise AI agent aimed at delivering measurable business value. The announcement frames it as a new phase for enterprise AI agents focused on practical business outcomes.

title: 01.AI's LLM One-box Solution Machine receives CAICT top-level certification
summary: 01.AI announced that its LLM One-box Solution Machine received top-level certification from CAICT. This certification signals external validation for the company’s enterprise AI infrastructure offering.

title: Yi-Lightning open-source MoE model highlighted as global SOTA
summary: 01.AI featured Yi-Lightning as a global state-of-the-art Mixture-of-Experts large language model and identified it as open-source. The mention positions Yi-Lightning as a flagship model announcement from the company.
